summary: Iteration 7 testing completed successfully. All 3 new features verified: (1) Migration endpoint /api/admin/migrate-phase-ids working, (2) Project status fix - ProjectDetail now correctly uses project.health field, (3) 3 new AI analysis endpoints (timesheet-insights, plan-allocation, move-phase) all working. Backend: 11/11 tests passed. Frontend: Dashboard and ProjectDetail correctly display health status.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/admin/migrate-phase-ids returns success with stats
Backend: POST /api/ai/timesheet-insights returns summary with total_entries, planned/actual hours
Backend: POST /api/ai/plan-allocation returns available_resources and recommendation
Backend: POST /api/ai/plan-allocation with date range and required_count
Backend: POST /api/projects/{project_id}/move-phase shifts phase dates correctly
Backend: POST /api/projects/{project_id}/move-phase returns 404 for invalid phase
Backend: POST /api/projects/{project_id}/move-phase returns 400 for zero shift
Backend: GET /api/projects returns health, schedule_status, actual_progress fields
Frontend: Dashboard displays Health column with Green/Amber indicators
Frontend: ProjectDetail page shows Schedule Health from project.health field
Frontend: Project phases displayed correctly (Discovery, Develop Sprint 1)

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Dashboard health status, ProjectDetail health status verified)

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing 14 projects, 5 resources, 2 timesheets
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features from iteration 7 tested and working: (1) Migration endpoint at POST /api/admin/migrate-phase-ids, (2) Project status fix - ProjectDetail uses project.health field correctly, (3) AI analysis endpoints: /api/ai/timesheet-insights, /api/ai/plan-allocation, /api/projects/{id}/move-phase. Test file at /app/tests/test_iteration7_ai_endpoints.py can be reused for regression testing.

migration_endpoint.description: Returns success with migration stats, processes projects in batches of 10

project_status_fix.description: ProjectDetail.js line 169 now uses project.health field, Dashboard line 240 also uses project.health
